caption: Did a 12hr at Lakeview today then roller skied 10k after. Lars would call that a recovery day.
you are genuinely unwell lol. did you eat
Had a granola bar between a foley cath and a blood draw. Practically a full meal.
Brandon. please.
5:15am classic session at Wirth before clinical. The trail was glass. 🎿 [1]
Roller ski intervals on the River Bottoms. Legs are cooked. #nordic [1]
12hr med-surg shift done, then 10k easy skate to shake it out. [1]
Kick wax dialed for -8C. Toko does not miss. #skiprep [1]
Sunday meal prep: chicken and rice bowls for the week. Iron-rich, on budget. [1]
Race morning at Birchwood. Bib pinned, skis flying. 🏁 [1]
Grandma Ingrid's cinnamon rolls, no notes. [1]
NCLEX question banks and black coffee. Senior year is a grind. [1]
New PR on the Nokomis loop. Garmin doesn't lie. [1]
Wax bench on the balcony at dawn, the smell of glide wax starts my weekend. [1]
Duluth trip to see Nils, brought the skate skis. [1]
Post-clinical sunset over the Stone Arch Bridge. [1]
Snow finally here. First on-snow classic of the season at Wirth. [1]
Study block with Hannah, pharm midterm Tuesday. [1]
Cold front rolling in, -15C start. Layered up and out the door. [1]
